Inkwhale Co is a seed-stage company. Founded by Mireille Coppersmith. The seed conversation started in 2025.

Mireille Coppersmith is the founder of Inkwhale Co. Mireille flagged churn as the top risk in the latest update.

turns.text: Partner meeting wrapped on the Inkwhale Co round.
We decided to wait on the Inkwhale Co round. We want next quarter's numbers first. Logging it now.
